scripts.build: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --max-old-space-size=8000" pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare build
scripts.deploy:app: pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare build && pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.preview: pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare build && pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare preview
